turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: My brother James just started a new job at Google.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: That's great! How's he liking it so far?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: He loves it. James lives in Seattle now, close to the office.

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: I went hiking in the mountains last weekend, it was amazing.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Nice, I love outdoor activities too. Did you see any wildlife?

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Just some deer. My favorite food afterward was Italian pasta, I was starving.

turns.speaker: Alice
turns.text: Work has been stressful lately, lots of deadlines.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Sorry to hear that. My sister Maria works at Microsoft and says the same thing.

turns.speaker: Bob
turns.text: Maria lives in Redmond, close to campus.
